codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly resolves both blocking failures from web-backend review and implements the UI timestamp carry-over correction with targeted regression coverage. RequestValidationError is normalized to HTTP 400, export fps now rejects non-positive values with HTTP 400 before generator calls, and formatTimestamp now carries tenths overflow into seconds/minutes/hours.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill prescribes tests-first (RED) as the default procedure, but this fix transcript applies implementation edits in app.py/index.html before adding most new tests, while handoff still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for f3af9880-7f39-40dc-87b2-61cab2360a6f shows Edit calls to snipsnap/web/app.py and snipsnap/web/static/index.html before the bulk test additions in tests/test_web.py; .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md step 2 requires write tests first (RED).

summary: Reviewed fix feature web-ui-scrutiny-fixes (commit 156018b) against prior failure report for web-backend (commit 2f31e84). The fix adequately addresses the original blocking issues (422 vs 400 validation semantics and invalid fps causing 500) and adds robust tests plus the requested timestamp carry-over correction, so this review passes.
